## Description
Describe the changes introduced by this PR. Detail the problem it solves and the implementation approach.

## Related Issue
Fixes #[issue-number] (if applicable)

## Type of Change
Please mark the options that apply:
- [ ] Bug fix (non-breaking change which fixes an issue)
- [ ] New feature (non-breaking change which adds functionality/detector)
- [ ] Performance optimization (non-breaking change which improves runtime/memory efficiency)
- [ ] Refactoring / Framework improvement (non-breaking code quality change)
- [ ] Documentation update

## Checklist
Please verify the following check items:
- [ ] My code follows the code style guidelines of this project.
- [ ] I have performed a self-review of my own code.
- [ ] I have commented my code, particularly in hard-to-understand areas.
- [ ] I have added new regression/unit tests corresponding to my changes.
- [ ] All new and existing tests pass successfully (`npm test` / scripts).
- [ ] The build completes cleanly without errors (`npx tsc --noEmit` / `npm run build`).
- [ ] I have verified that my regex patterns do not introduce ReDoS vulnerabilities.
